name: Fake Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Crumbs (corn flakes, or other preferred crumbs)
Spices of your choice (e.g., paprika, oregano, thyme, hot pepper flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the coating: Put enough cereal in a blender to make 1 cup of crumbs. You can use Italian bread crumbs, pita, or cereal for a crunchier coating. Add your favorite spices and blend or mix well.
2. Coat the chicken: Remove the skin from the chicken breasts and coat each piece with yogurt.
3. Roll in crumbs: Dip the coated chicken pieces into the breadcrumb mixture, ensuring they are fully covered.
4. Bake: Place the coated chicken on a cookie sheet sprayed with Pam. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about one hour.
This low-calorie recipe is suitable for various diet plans, such as Weight Watchers (WW), 4Point Diet, and others that require minimal milk, bread, or other ingredients.
